channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Agent Workbench - Wed May 13 13:04:25 UTC 2026
item.description:
Run and manage AI coding agents — Codex, Claude, Junie, and more — directly inside your IDE. Quick Launch — press Cmd+\ / Ctrl+\ from anywhere to start a new task or...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 1173 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.intellij.agent.workbench

item.title: AppGlass Debugger - Fri May 15 15:20:20 UTC 2026
item.description:
AppGlass Debugger lets you attach to running production or staging applications and inspect real execution data without redeploys, restarts, or opening debug ports...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 25 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: LiveDebugger
